recommendations.title: Flicka 2
recommendations.overview: Carrie is a big-city teenager whose life is turned upside down when she moves to a horse ranch in Wyoming to live with her father. But everything changes when Carrie meets Flicka, a wild, jet-black mustang who's just as free-spirited and strong-wille

recommendations.title: Black Beauty
recommendations.overview: The fates of horses, and the people who own and command them, are revealed as Black Beauty narrates the circle of his life.

recommendations.title: The Neighbors' Window
recommendations.overview: The story of a middle-aged woman with small children whose life is shaken up when two free-spirited twenty-somethings move in across the street.

recommendations.title: Stage Door
recommendations.overview: A spirited heiress wishing to break into theatre on her own merit arrives at a boardinghouse where aspiring young actresses and showgirls are brought together through their cynicism and disappointments.

recommendations.title: Vita & Virginia
recommendations.overview: Socialite Vita Sackville-West and literary icon Virginia Woolf run in different circles in 1920s London. Despite the odds, the two forge an unconventional affair, set against the backdrop of their own strikingly contemporary marriages.

recommendations.title: Dangerous Animals
recommendations.overview: A savvy and free-spirited surfer is abducted by a shark-obsessed serial killer. Held captive on his boat, she must figure out how to escape before he carries out a ritualistic feeding to the sharks below.

recommendations.title: Alesha Popovich and Tugarin the Dragon
recommendations.overview: Alesha Popovich has to catch Tugarin Zmey and bring back the stolen money with the help of a talking Horse (which talks all the time and has an opinion on everything), a wise granny, a donkey and a beauty Lyubava.

recommendations.title: Caramel
recommendations.overview: In a beauty salon in Beirut the lives of five women cross paths. The beauty salon is a colorful and sensual microcosm where they share and entrust their hopes, fears and expectations.

recommendations.title: The World to Come
recommendations.overview: In 1856, two women forge a close connection despite their isolation on the American frontier.

recommendations.title: Parthenope
recommendations.overview: Parthenope, born in the sea near Naples in 1950, is beautiful, enigmatic, and intelligent. She is shamelessly courted by many. However, beauty comes at a cost.
